privileged_info_summary: The docker_autoheal_watchdog task is a synthetic scenario with all data generated during setup. The task requires implementing a Docker healthcheck and watchdog pattern for a Payment Gateway service. Verified endpoints: health check at http://localhost:8000/health (returns 200 when healthy, 500 when unhealthy), sabotage trigger at http://localhost:8000/sabotage (POST method). Gateway service runs on port 8000. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/payment-gateway. Success scoring requires pass_threshold of 80 points. The verification monitors for automatic container restart within 60 seconds after sabotage trigger. All endpoints and port configurations match the metadata claims.
